text.title: E2E Testing Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion referencing a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the input profile satisfy preconditions (drivers present: framework_preference, visual_regression_needed, ci_machine_budget, journey_count)?

conclusion.verdict: Profile incomplete — return structured error, do not guess defaults.
Pick Playwright — superior parallelism, network interception, tracing.

branch.when: drivers.valid == true AND framework_preference == 'cypress-migration' AND visual_regression_needed == true

conclusion.verdict: Stay on Cypress short-term; use component-scoped snapshots with masked regions.

branch.when: drivers.valid == true AND framework_preference == 'cypress-migration' AND visual_regression_needed == false AND ci_machine_budget >= 4

conclusion.verdict: Shard the suite across 4 CI machines; merge blob reports.

branch.when: drivers.valid == true AND framework_preference == 'cypress-migration' AND visual_regression_needed == false AND ci_machine_budget < 4

conclusion.verdict: Single runner with retries: 2 and trace: on-first-retry.
